_comment: Per-case mount layout for the transversal_modeler role. Inputs are upstream (ingestion-shaped) artifacts: normalized CSVs + manifest JSON. The runner reads this to construct the session_resources array.
_note_on_mount_paths: Per sessions-expert.md: type=file resources are auto-prefixed with /mnt/session/uploads/. So fixtures land at /mnt/session/uploads/out/tafi_2025/... — kickoff prompts must reference those absolute paths.
_note_on_fixtures: fixture_local_path is a runner-only field (not part of the session_resources API). The runner uploads each fixture file via `ant beta:files upload`, captures the file_id, then constructs the session_resources with the file_id and mount_path. Synthesized values; assertions target structure, not numbers.
